column2: Description
Defines configurable dynamic fields displayed in the booking form (e.g., Waiter needed, Reimbursement, Allergies, Commute method).
Headers for employee tag.
Headers for room tag.
Headers for seating plan.
Headers for desk tag.
Headers for parking tag.
Headers for landing plan.
Defines at what period hour your booking request expires.
Defines the maximum number of Work From Office bookings allowed per week.
Defines the maximum number of Work From Office bookings allowed per month.
Defines the maximum number of Work From Home bookings allowed per week.
Defines the maximum number of Work From Home bookings allowed per month.
Defines service availability on PMS.
Defines whether the PMS is working on the wisseatbooking service.
Enables bulk upload flow for amenities.
Defines the Seat Booking service URL.
Controls whether the booking request approval workflow is enabled.
Controls whether the approval workflow is enabled for Work From Office bookings.
Controls whether the approval workflow is enabled for Work From Home bookings.
Controls whether booking requests are automatically approved without manual intervention.
Controls when a pending seat booking request should be treated as expired.
Defines how many minutes before a booking approval request expires. Used in conjunction with expiryCutOffInMinutes for approval-flow reminders.
Controls whether notifications are sent for pending booking approval requests.
Controls whether notifications are sent for approved booking approval requests.
Controls whether notifications are sent for rejected booking approval requests.
Controls whether notifications are sent when booking approval requests expire.
Controls whether email notifications are sent for booking approvals.
Defines the list of enabled booking tags (e.g. WFO, WFH).
Defines whether it should allow cancellation of commute service.
Defines the column mapping and labels used in forecasting reports.
